data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the electronic signature capture feature, which is explicitly mentioned in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms the implementation or functionality of this feature, leading to a clear gap in meeting the requirement. The absence of any related evidence or endpoints that demonstrate the electronic signature capture capability directly supports the failure of this validation step.
gaps: No evidence of electronic signature capture functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
